title: Phase 8A: Collections backend - collections service, credit service, API routes
description: Build collections backend: collections service with aging calculation, account assignment, promise tracking, dispute management, and escalation; credit service with hold recommendation engine and hold/release workflow; and all collections API routes.
steps: Create src/lib/services/collections.service.ts with aging bucket calculation (current, 30, 60, 90, 120+)
Implement account assignment to collectors, call logging, promise-to-pay tracking
Implement dispute management lifecycle and escalation rules
Create src/lib/services/credit.service.ts with credit hold recommendation engine
Implement hold/release workflow with approval integration
Create src/app/api/collections/route.ts with collections overview and account list
